headline: Zuckerberg, Dimon Sold Shares Ahead Of Stock Rout Triggered By Trump Tariff Talk
summary: Insiders including Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META)'s Mark Zuckerberg, Oracle Corp. (NYSE: ORCL)'s Safra Catz, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM)'s Jamie Dimon offloaded shares worth billions prior to President Donald Trump's tariff declarations

headline: Jeff Bezos Once Tried to Buy Netflix, Co-Founder Says: 'We Said No and Then Worked Our A-- Off for 20 Years'
summary: During the formative years of Netflix, co-founders Marc Randolph and Reed Hastings made a bold decision to decline an acquisition proposal from Jeff Bezos, the founder of Amazon.
